seed_products.php line 45; custom internal SKU created for Drupal Commerce database (official Sony model numbers are WH1000XM5/S for silver and WH1000XM5/B for black)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding a Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones to a shopping cart in a Drupal Commerce storefront. The product title 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and SKU 'SONY-WH1000XM5' are verified against the product seed database (seed_products.php) and match the real Sony product specifications including 30-hour battery life, 4 beamforming microphones, and industry-leading noise cancellation. The product is seeded with a retail price of $348.00 USD. The product data is based on real Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones but deployed in a synthetic Drupal Commerce test environment.
